tagline: Quantify every trade with probability math

steps.description: Current price field fills with a realistic asset price, setting the base for all calculations
Tab switches to 期权产品 mode, revealing options-specific parameters and form fields
Switches back to linear product mode showing familiar long/short direction fields
Scrolls down to reveal the price target and probability distribution table with input rows
Triggers full expected value calculation, revealing EV result, win rate, and reward-risk metrics
